description: Configure the Maven project 'csv-stats' located at ~/IdeaProjects/csv-stats to produce an executable JAR file at target/csv-stats-1.0.jar. The JAR must bundle all dependencies, including Apache Commons CSV, and specify 'com.csvstats.App' as the Main-Class. Verify the configuration by ensuring the JAR runs correctly when executed against the data at src/main/resources/sample_data.csv.
